[2018-03-31 21:12] nirv9924 (Nirv): so I checked statsforge and my hidden rating  is 1783. is that  a good rating for someone at tier 9 ?
[2018-03-31 21:13] medar: with that rating it's just a matter of time until you hit master tier
[2018-03-31 21:13] .bky_1556 (bky): Tier 9 varies a lot.
[2018-03-31 21:13] mrguy888: master cutoff is 1550
[2018-03-31 21:14] mrguy888: so you will easily get master
[2018-03-31 21:14] .bky_1556 (bky): Less so than in the wall era where a 1900 player would struggle massively to hit master, but it still varies a lot.
[2018-03-31 21:14] darkeisbein: master cutoff means?
[2018-03-31 21:14] mrguy888: tiers rubber band you
[2018-03-31 21:14] mrguy888: based on your rating
[2018-03-31 21:15] mrguy888: the higher your rating the more tier progress you gain from wins and the less you lose from losses
[2018-03-31 21:15] mrguy888: from 1550 and up it trends you toward tier x
[2018-03-31 21:17] .bky_1556 (bky): A long time ago there was a bug and the rubber banding would overflow  if your rating got too high.
[2018-03-31 21:18] .bky_1556 (bky): So a mediocre player would make it into Master with moderate difficulty, but you couldn't get in with an 80% win rate against existing Masters.
[2018-03-31 21:19] masn6811 (Masne98888): it wasnt an overflow
[2018-03-31 21:19] .bky_1556 (bky): It'd give you +2 for a win and -20 for a loss, or thereabouts.
[2018-03-31 21:19] masn6811 (Masne98888): the rubberbanding, was just broken, period
[2018-03-31 21:19] masn6811 (Masne98888): because it would try to rubberband you to tier X
[2018-03-31 21:19] masn6811 (Masne98888): but the thing is, it would try tier X, 0%, because X didn't have %s
[2018-03-31 21:20] masn6811 (Masne98888): and that's actually lower than tier IX, 100%, because there was overlap
[2018-03-31 21:20] masn6811 (Masne98888): i actually managed to get MasN2 to X under that rubberbanding. It was like an 8 win streak or something
[2018-03-31 21:20] masn6811 (Masne98888): it was hell. they should make that required for all new players :LongNoseLiar:
[2018-03-31 21:21] .bky_1556 (bky): I was in tier IX within one day of tiers existing, and remained in tier IX until they fixed the bug.
[2018-03-31 21:23] masn6811 (Masne98888): true mata players ascend past the rubberband
[2018-03-31 21:24] .bky_1556 (bky): true mata players throw games to get their rating back down below 1550, apparently.
[2018-03-31 21:26] masn6811 (Masne98888): like the thing is even if its trying to rubberband you down, as long as you keep winning, you'll eventually get there
